_comment: Best-effort starter decks, used ONLY to seed the deck tracker BEFORE the first combat of a run. As soon as the advisor observes a combat it overwrites this with the real deck read from the game's piles, so any inaccuracy here self-corrects within the first fight. StS2 is in beta — edit these if a starter deck changes. Characters not listed here simply stay deck-blind until the first combat snapshot. Keys are the lowercased character name with a leading 'The ' stripped.
